creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon Jan 13 21:09:13  2025 UTC, fax@nohik.ee wrote:
> Created attachment 256673
> Telegraf ktrace.out before process restart
> Telegraf pid was 18418 if its important

But the ktrace.out has trace for PID 18727 (also telegraf).  How did that
happen?  The ktrace.out doesn't have a single syscall on a socket, neither
has call to exit the program.  Maybe somehow traced a wrong PID?
